description: You are a platform engineer responsible for enforcing resource governance on production containers. Apply the following resource limits and restart policies to the running containers: 'acme-api' (256MB memory, 0.5 CPUs, restart 'unless-stopped'), 'acme-worker' (512MB memory, 1.0 CPUs, restart 'on-failure' with max 3 retries), and 'acme-cache' (128MB memory, 0.25 CPUs, restart 'always'). Verify the 'acme-worker' restart policy by performing a stress test to trigger an Out-Of-Memory (OOM) kill. Document the applied limits for all three containers and the results of the stress test in a markdown file at ~/Desktop/resource_governance.md.
